title: iberis aurosica subsp. nana
intro: Iberis aurosica subsp. nana, also known as Dwarf Candytuft, is a compact, flowering shrub native to Europe and Asia. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dwarf Candytuft include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Dwarf Candytuft can be prepared as an herbal tea by steeping its flowers in hot water, or used in infusions, salves, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
